title: dactylorhiza × stenostachys nothosubsp. stenkyrkae
intro: Dactylorhiza × stenostachys nothosubsp. stenkyrkae, a hybrid orchid species, is a type of orchid that grows in specific regions, resulting from a cross between Dactylorhiza sambucina and Dactylorhiza maculata. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits associated with Dactylorhiza × stenostachys nothosubsp. stenkyrkae include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
